subject: Fix SDN-C bundles that don't come up properly
commit_message:
Fix SDN-C bundles that don't come up properly

Change-Id: Ieccbd863e45bb68d76f4f1f066433276c9adf3cd
Signed-off-by: jmac <james.macnider@amdocs.com>
Issue-ID: OOM-945
